---
title: "Population Summaries"
toc: true
execute:
  echo: false
  warning: false
  message: false
---


```{r packages}
library(here)
library(tidyverse)
library(sf)
library(arrow)
library(patchwork)
library(showtext)

showtext_auto()
font_add("Arial", regular = here("assets/LiberationSans-Regular.ttf"))

options(scipen = 9999)
set.seed(708)
```

```{r data_check}
expected_parquet <- c(
  'race',
  'poverty_lt_100',
  'vehicle_avail',
  'housing_cost_burden',
  'population',
  'region_pop_vehicle',
  'region_pop_race',
  'region_pop_poverty',
  'region_pop_housing'
)
missing_parquet <- expected_parquet[
  !file.exists(here(
    'data/processed/nhgis',
    paste0(expected_parquet, '.parquet')
  ))
]
if (length(missing_parquet) > 0) {
  stop(
    "Run prep_population.R from the project root first. Missing: ",
    paste(missing_parquet, collapse = ', ')
  )
}
if (!file.exists(here('data/processed/tiger_tracts.geojson'))) {
  stop("Run prep_tracts.R from the project root first.")
}
```

```{r get_tracts}
tract_sf <- bind_rows(
  read_sf(here('data/processed/tract_WHP_AK.geojson')) %>%
    filter(substr(GEOID, 1, 2) == '02'),
  read_sf(here('data/processed/tract_WHP_HI.geojson')) %>% # !!! NOTHING HERE !!!
    filter(substr(GEOID, 1, 2) == '11'),
  read_sf(here('data/processed/tract_WHP_CONUS.geojson')) %>%
    filter(!(substr(GEOID, 1, 2) %in% c('02', '11')))
)
```

```{r join_tract_pop}
# Join tract-level population to WHP tracts (most recent period per tract)
tract_pop <- read_parquet(here('data/processed/nhgis/population.parquet')) %>%
  group_by(GEOID) %>%
  filter(start_year == max(start_year)) %>%
  ungroup() %>%
  select(GEOID, pop)

tract_sf <- tract_sf %>%
  left_join(tract_pop, by = 'GEOID')
```

```{r census_data}
race <- read_parquet(here('data/processed/nhgis/race.parquet'))
poverty <- read_parquet(here('data/processed/nhgis/poverty_lt_100.parquet'))
vehicle_avail <- read_parquet(here(
  'data/processed/nhgis/vehicle_avail.parquet'
))
housing_cost <- read_parquet(here(
  'data/processed/nhgis/housing_cost_burden.parquet'
))
```

```{r wfbz_data}
wfbz <- read_sf(here('data/raw/wfbz_disasters_2000-2025.geojson'))
```

```{r spatial_join}
#| cache: True
# Lean spatial join: just get wildfire_id -> GEOID mappings (no census payload)
wf_tract_matches <- st_join(
  wfbz %>% select(wildfire_id, wildfire_year),
  tract_sf %>% select(GEOID, census_year),
  join = st_is_within_distance,
  dist = units::as_units(10, 'km')
) %>%
  st_drop_geometry() %>%
  filter(10 * floor(wildfire_year / 10) == census_year)


# For each variable: join flat census data, pick the survey period whose
# midpoint is closest to the wildfire year (handles pre-ACS fires and
# post-2022 fires that fall outside strict period coverage)
join_census <- function(matches, census_data) {
  # Pick one period per wildfire_year so all fires and tracts in a given year
  # use the same census period
  best_period_by_year <- matches %>%
    left_join(
      census_data %>% distinct(GEOID, period, start_year, end_year),
      by = 'GEOID',
      relationship = 'many-to-many'
    ) %>%
    distinct(wildfire_year, period, start_year, end_year) %>%
    group_by(wildfire_year) %>%
    slice_min(
      abs(wildfire_year - (start_year + end_year) / 2),
      n = 1,
      with_ties = FALSE
    ) %>%
    ungroup() %>%
    select(wildfire_year, period)
  matches %>%
    inner_join(best_period_by_year, by = 'wildfire_year') %>%
    inner_join(
      census_data,
      by = c('GEOID', 'period'),
      relationship = 'many-to-many'
    )
}

race_by_wf <- join_census(wf_tract_matches, race)
poverty_by_wf <- join_census(wf_tract_matches, poverty)
vehicle_avail_by_wf <- join_census(wf_tract_matches, vehicle_avail)
housing_cost_by_wf <- join_census(wf_tract_matches, housing_cost)

rm(wf_tract_matches, race, poverty, vehicle_avail, housing_cost)

# Aggregate across tracts per wildfire
race_summ <- race_by_wf %>%
  group_by(wildfire_id, race, ethnicity, period) %>%
  summarize(count = sum(count), .groups = 'drop') %>%
  group_by(wildfire_id) %>%
  mutate(frac = count / sum(count)) %>%
  ungroup()

poverty_summ <- poverty_by_wf %>%
  group_by(wildfire_id, category, period) %>%
  summarize(count = sum(count), .groups = 'drop') %>%
  group_by(wildfire_id) %>%
  mutate(frac = count / sum(count)) %>%
  ungroup()

vehicle_avail_summ <- vehicle_avail_by_wf %>%
  group_by(wildfire_id, no_vehicle, period) %>%
  summarize(count = sum(count), .groups = 'drop') %>%
  group_by(wildfire_id) %>%
  mutate(frac = count / sum(count)) %>%
  ungroup()

housing_cost_summ <- housing_cost_by_wf %>%
  group_by(wildfire_id, cost_burdened, period) %>%
  summarize(count = sum(count), .groups = 'drop') %>%
  group_by(wildfire_id) %>%
  mutate(frac = count / sum(count)) %>%
  ungroup()

# Checks: fracs sum to ~1, fracs agree with counts
check_fracs <- function(df, label) {
  frac_sums <- df %>%
    group_by(wildfire_id) %>%
    summarize(frac_sum = sum(frac), count_total = sum(count), .groups = 'drop')
  n_nan <- sum(is.nan(frac_sums$frac_sum)) # all-zero count groups
  bad_sum <- filter(frac_sums, abs(frac_sum - 1) > 0.01)
  bad_agree <- df %>%
    group_by(wildfire_id) %>%
    mutate(expected_frac = count / sum(count)) %>%
    filter(abs(frac - expected_frac) > 1e-9) %>%
    nrow()
  tibble(
    variable = label,
    n_wildfires = n_distinct(df$wildfire_id),
    frac_sum_ok = nrow(bad_sum) == 0,
    n_all_zero = n_nan,
    frac_min = round(min(frac_sums$frac_sum, na.rm = TRUE), 4),
    frac_max = round(max(frac_sums$frac_sum, na.rm = TRUE), 4),
    count_agree = bad_agree == 0
  )
}

bind_rows(
  check_fracs(race_summ, 'race'),
  check_fracs(poverty_summ, 'poverty'),
  check_fracs(vehicle_avail_summ, 'vehicle_avail'),
  check_fracs(housing_cost_summ, 'housing_cost')
) |>
  knitr::kable()

# Column schema: <var>|period, <var>|count|<category>, <var>|frac|<category>
z <- reduce(
  list(
    race_summ %>%
      rename(`race|period` = period) %>%
      pivot_wider(
        values_from = c(count, frac),
        names_from = c(race, ethnicity),
        names_prefix = 'race|',
        names_sep = '|'
      ),
    poverty_summ %>%
      rename(`poverty|period` = period) %>%
      pivot_wider(
        values_from = c(count, frac),
        names_from = category,
        names_prefix = 'poverty|',
        names_sep = '|'
      ),
    vehicle_avail_summ %>%
      rename(`vehicle_avail|period` = period) %>%
      pivot_wider(
        values_from = c(count, frac),
        names_from = no_vehicle,
        names_prefix = 'vehicle_avail|',
        names_sep = '|'
      ),
    housing_cost_summ %>%
      rename(`housing_cost|period` = period) %>%
      pivot_wider(
        values_from = c(count, frac),
        names_from = cost_burdened,
        names_prefix = 'housing_cost|',
        names_sep = '|'
      )
  ),
  left_join,
  by = 'wildfire_id'
)
```

```{r qa_missing}
#| fig-cap: "QA: fires missing census data (colored) vs. all fires (grey)"
#| warning: false
missing_sf <- anti_join(wfbz, z, by = 'wildfire_id') %>%
  filter(!st_is_empty(geometry)) %>%
  st_centroid()

all_centroids <- wfbz %>%
  filter(!st_is_empty(geometry)) %>%
  st_centroid()

world_sf <- st_as_sf(maps::map("world", plot = FALSE, fill = TRUE))

ggplot() +
  geom_sf(data = world_sf, fill = 'grey95', color = 'grey70', linewidth = 0.2) +
  geom_sf(data = all_centroids, size = 0.2, color = 'grey60') +
  geom_sf(data = missing_sf, aes(color = factor(wildfire_year)), size = 0.8) +
  scale_color_viridis_d(option = 'turbo') +
  theme_void() +
  labs(color = 'Year') +
  ggtitle(
    "Fires missing census data",
    subtitle = glue::glue(
      "{nrow(missing_sf)} of {nrow(all_centroids)} fires ({round(100*nrow(missing_sf)/nrow(all_centroids))}%)"
    )
  )
```

```{r region_setup}
REGION_ORDER <- tibble(
  usfs_region = c(
    "California",
    "Southern",
    "Alaska",
    "Southern Rockies",
    "Southwestern",
    "Northern Rockies",
    "Intermountain",
    "Pacific Northwest",
    "Eastern",
    "Hawaii"
  ),
  plot_order = 10:1
)
region_colors <- c(khroma::color('light', reverse = FALSE)(9), '#ac87cc')
region_colors[region_colors == '#dddddd'] <- '#757575'
attr(region_colors, "missing") <- NA
names(region_colors) <- sort(REGION_ORDER$usfs_region)

# Assign each fire to its nearest USFS region (regions.geojson built by main.qmd)
regions <- read_sf(here('data/processed/regions.geojson'))
wfbz_region <- wfbz %>%
  filter(!st_is_empty(geometry)) %>%
  select(wildfire_id) %>%
  mutate(
    usfs_region = regions$usfs_region[st_nearest_feature(geometry, regions)]
  ) %>%
  st_drop_geometry()

pop_theme <- theme_minimal(base_family = "Arial") +
  theme(
    panel.border = element_rect(color = "grey25", fill = NA, linewidth = .25),
    panel.grid = element_blank(),
    axis.text.x = element_text(angle = 90, vjust = .5),
    axis.ticks = element_line(),
    plot.margin = unit(c(0, 0, 0, 0), "pt"),
    legend.position = 'none'
  )

plot_pop_var <- function(df, label) {
  df %>%
    ggplot(aes(x = wildfire_year)) +
    geom_line(
      aes(y = frac_pop, color = usfs_region),
      linetype = 'dashed',
      linewidth = 0.4
    ) +
    geom_point(aes(y = frac_pop, color = usfs_region), size = 1, shape = 1) +
    geom_line(aes(y = frac, color = usfs_region)) +
    geom_point(aes(y = frac, color = usfs_region), size = 1) +
    scale_color_manual(name = "Region", values = region_colors) +
    scale_x_continuous(
      limits = c(2000, 2024),
      breaks = seq(2000, 2024, by = 2)
    ) +
    scale_y_continuous(labels = scales::percent) +
    facet_wrap(~usfs_region, ncol = 1, scales = 'free_y') +
    xlab(NULL) +
    ylab(label) +
    pop_theme
}
```

```{r region_pop}
region_pop_vehicle <- read_parquet(here(
  'data/processed/nhgis/region_pop_vehicle.parquet'
))
region_pop_race <- read_parquet(here(
  'data/processed/nhgis/region_pop_race.parquet'
))
region_pop_poverty <- read_parquet(here(
  'data/processed/nhgis/region_pop_poverty.parquet'
))
region_pop_housing <- read_parquet(here(
  'data/processed/nhgis/region_pop_housing.parquet'
))
```

## Vehicle Availability

```{r vehicle_avail_fig, fig.height = 16}
#| fig-cap: "Share of fire-affected households with no vehicle access, by USFS region and year"
vehicle_avail_by_region <- vehicle_avail_by_wf %>%
  inner_join(wfbz_region, by = 'wildfire_id') %>%
  group_by(wildfire_year, usfs_region) %>%
  summarize(
    frac = sum(count[no_vehicle == TRUE], na.rm = TRUE) /
      sum(count, na.rm = TRUE),
    .groups = 'drop'
  ) %>%
  left_join(region_pop_vehicle, by = c('wildfire_year', 'usfs_region')) %>%
  inner_join(REGION_ORDER, by = 'usfs_region') %>%
  mutate(usfs_region = fct_reorder(usfs_region, plot_order))

plot_pop_var(vehicle_avail_by_region, "Share with no vehicle")
```

## Race

```{r race_fig, fig.height = 16}
#| fig-cap: "Share of fire-affected population that is Non-Hispanic White, by USFS region and year"
race_by_region <- race_by_wf %>%
  inner_join(wfbz_region, by = 'wildfire_id') %>%
  group_by(wildfire_year, usfs_region) %>%
  summarize(
    frac = sum(
      count[
        ethnicity == "Not Hispanic or Latino" & race == "White (single race)"
      ],
      na.rm = TRUE
    ) /
      sum(count, na.rm = TRUE),
    .groups = 'drop'
  ) %>%
  left_join(region_pop_race, by = c('wildfire_year', 'usfs_region')) %>%
  inner_join(REGION_ORDER, by = 'usfs_region') %>%
  mutate(usfs_region = fct_reorder(usfs_region, plot_order))

plot_pop_var(race_by_region, "Share Non-Hispanic White")
```

## Poverty

```{r poverty_fig, fig.height = 16}
#| fig-cap: "Population below 100% of poverty line near wildfire burn zones, by USFS region and year"
poverty_by_region <- poverty_by_wf %>%
  inner_join(wfbz_region, by = 'wildfire_id') %>%
  group_by(wildfire_year, usfs_region) %>%
  summarize(
    frac = sum(count[poverty_lt_100 == TRUE], na.rm = TRUE) /
      sum(count, na.rm = TRUE),
    .groups = 'drop'
  ) %>%
  left_join(region_pop_poverty, by = c('wildfire_year', 'usfs_region')) %>%
  inner_join(REGION_ORDER, by = 'usfs_region') %>%
  mutate(usfs_region = fct_reorder(usfs_region, plot_order))

plot_pop_var(poverty_by_region, "Share below 100% poverty line")
```

## Housing Cost Burden

```{r housing_cost_fig, fig.height = 16}
#| fig-cap: "Cost-burdened households (≥50% income on housing) near wildfire burn zones, by USFS region and year"
housing_cost_by_region <- housing_cost_by_wf %>%
  inner_join(wfbz_region, by = 'wildfire_id') %>%
  group_by(wildfire_year, usfs_region) %>%
  summarize(
    frac = sum(count[cost_burdened == TRUE], na.rm = TRUE) /
      sum(count, na.rm = TRUE),
    .groups = 'drop'
  ) %>%
  left_join(region_pop_housing, by = c('wildfire_year', 'usfs_region')) %>%
  inner_join(REGION_ORDER, by = 'usfs_region') %>%
  mutate(usfs_region = fct_reorder(usfs_region, plot_order))

plot_pop_var(housing_cost_by_region, "Share housing cost burdened (≥50%)")
```

## Diverging Charts

```{r high_risk_tracts}
# Assign USFS regions to tracts; identify high-risk tracts
# (>= 90th percentile of pop * whp_mean within each region)
tract_risk <- tract_sf %>%
  filter(!is.na(whp_mean), !is.na(pop), pop > 0) %>%
  mutate(
    usfs_region = regions$usfs_region[st_nearest_feature(geometry, regions)],
    pop_whp = pop * whp_mean
  ) %>%
  st_drop_geometry()

high_risk_tracts <- tract_risk %>%
  group_by(usfs_region) %>%
  filter(pop_whp >= quantile(pop_whp, 0.9, na.rm = TRUE)) %>%
  ungroup() %>%
  select(GEOID, usfs_region)

high_risk_geoids <- high_risk_tracts$GEOID
```

```{r diverge_data}
# Pool all years: fire-affected fracs
fire_vehicle <- vehicle_avail_by_wf %>%
  summarize(
    frac = sum(count[no_vehicle == TRUE], na.rm = TRUE) /
      sum(count, na.rm = TRUE)
  ) %>%
  mutate(stat = "No vehicle")

fire_poverty <- poverty_by_wf %>%
  summarize(
    frac = sum(count[poverty_lt_100 == TRUE], na.rm = TRUE) /
      sum(count, na.rm = TRUE)
  ) %>%
  mutate(stat = "Below poverty line")

fire_housing <- housing_cost_by_wf %>%
  summarize(
    frac = sum(count[cost_burdened == TRUE], na.rm = TRUE) /
      sum(count, na.rm = TRUE)
  ) %>%
  mutate(stat = "Housing cost burdened")

fire_white <- race_by_wf %>%
  summarize(
    frac = sum(
      count[
        ethnicity == "Not Hispanic or Latino" & race == "White (single race)"
      ],
      na.rm = TRUE
    ) /
      sum(count, na.rm = TRUE)
  ) %>%
  mutate(stat = "Non-Hispanic White")

# Reference population fracs: high-risk tracts (>= 90th pctl pop*whp by region)
most_recent_period <- function(dat) {
  dat %>%
    group_by(GEOID) %>%
    filter(start_year == max(start_year)) %>%
    ungroup()
}

pop_vehicle_all <- read_parquet(here(
  'data/processed/nhgis/vehicle_avail.parquet'
)) %>%
  most_recent_period() %>%
  filter(GEOID %in% high_risk_geoids) %>%
  summarize(
    frac_pop = sum(count[no_vehicle == TRUE], na.rm = TRUE) /
      sum(count, na.rm = TRUE)
  ) %>%
  mutate(stat = "No vehicle")

pop_poverty_all <- read_parquet(here(
  'data/processed/nhgis/poverty_lt_100.parquet'
)) %>%
  most_recent_period() %>%
  filter(GEOID %in% high_risk_geoids) %>%
  summarize(
    frac_pop = sum(count[poverty_lt_100 == TRUE], na.rm = TRUE) /
      sum(count, na.rm = TRUE)
  ) %>%
  mutate(stat = "Below poverty line")

pop_housing_all <- read_parquet(here(
  'data/processed/nhgis/housing_cost_burden.parquet'
)) %>%
  most_recent_period() %>%
  filter(GEOID %in% high_risk_geoids) %>%
  summarize(
    frac_pop = sum(count[cost_burdened == TRUE], na.rm = TRUE) /
      sum(count, na.rm = TRUE)
  ) %>%
  mutate(stat = "Housing cost burdened")

pop_white_all <- read_parquet(here('data/processed/nhgis/race.parquet')) %>%
  most_recent_period() %>%
  filter(GEOID %in% high_risk_geoids) %>%
  summarize(
    frac_pop = sum(
      count[
        ethnicity == "Not Hispanic or Latino" & race == "White (single race)"
      ],
      na.rm = TRUE
    ) /
      sum(count, na.rm = TRUE)
  ) %>%
  mutate(stat = "Non-Hispanic White")

# National diverging data
stat_order <- c(
  "Non-Hispanic White",
  "No vehicle",
  "Below poverty line",
  "Housing cost burdened"
)

diverge_national <- bind_rows(
  bind_cols(fire_vehicle, pop_vehicle_all %>% select(frac_pop)),
  bind_cols(fire_poverty, pop_poverty_all %>% select(frac_pop)),
  bind_cols(fire_housing, pop_housing_all %>% select(frac_pop)),
  bind_cols(fire_white, pop_white_all %>% select(frac_pop))
) %>%
  mutate(
    diff = frac - frac_pop,
    stat = factor(stat, levels = stat_order)
  )

# Regional diverging data: fire side
fire_vehicle_reg <- vehicle_avail_by_wf %>%
  inner_join(wfbz_region, by = 'wildfire_id') %>%
  group_by(usfs_region) %>%
  summarize(
    frac = sum(count[no_vehicle == TRUE], na.rm = TRUE) /
      sum(count, na.rm = TRUE)
  ) %>%
  mutate(stat = "No vehicle")

fire_poverty_reg <- poverty_by_wf %>%
  inner_join(wfbz_region, by = 'wildfire_id') %>%
  group_by(usfs_region) %>%
  summarize(
    frac = sum(count[poverty_lt_100 == TRUE], na.rm = TRUE) /
      sum(count, na.rm = TRUE)
  ) %>%
  mutate(stat = "Below poverty line")

fire_housing_reg <- housing_cost_by_wf %>%
  inner_join(wfbz_region, by = 'wildfire_id') %>%
  group_by(usfs_region) %>%
  summarize(
    frac = sum(count[cost_burdened == TRUE], na.rm = TRUE) /
      sum(count, na.rm = TRUE)
  ) %>%
  mutate(stat = "Housing cost burdened")

fire_white_reg <- race_by_wf %>%
  inner_join(wfbz_region, by = 'wildfire_id') %>%
  group_by(usfs_region) %>%
  summarize(
    frac = sum(
      count[
        ethnicity == "Not Hispanic or Latino" & race == "White (single race)"
      ],
      na.rm = TRUE
    ) /
      sum(count, na.rm = TRUE)
  ) %>%
  mutate(stat = "Non-Hispanic White")

# Regional pop side: high-risk tracts per region
pop_vehicle_reg <- read_parquet(here(
  'data/processed/nhgis/vehicle_avail.parquet'
)) %>%
  most_recent_period() %>%
  inner_join(high_risk_tracts, by = 'GEOID') %>%
  group_by(usfs_region) %>%
  summarize(
    frac_pop = sum(count[no_vehicle == TRUE], na.rm = TRUE) /
      sum(count, na.rm = TRUE)
  ) %>%
  mutate(stat = "No vehicle")

pop_poverty_reg <- read_parquet(here(
  'data/processed/nhgis/poverty_lt_100.parquet'
)) %>%
  most_recent_period() %>%
  inner_join(high_risk_tracts, by = 'GEOID') %>%
  group_by(usfs_region) %>%
  summarize(
    frac_pop = sum(count[poverty_lt_100 == TRUE], na.rm = TRUE) /
      sum(count, na.rm = TRUE)
  ) %>%
  mutate(stat = "Below poverty line")

pop_housing_reg <- read_parquet(here(
  'data/processed/nhgis/housing_cost_burden.parquet'
)) %>%
  most_recent_period() %>%
  inner_join(high_risk_tracts, by = 'GEOID') %>%
  group_by(usfs_region) %>%
  summarize(
    frac_pop = sum(count[cost_burdened == TRUE], na.rm = TRUE) /
      sum(count, na.rm = TRUE)
  ) %>%
  mutate(stat = "Housing cost burdened")

pop_white_reg <- read_parquet(here('data/processed/nhgis/race.parquet')) %>%
  most_recent_period() %>%
  inner_join(high_risk_tracts, by = 'GEOID') %>%
  group_by(usfs_region) %>%
  summarize(
    frac_pop = sum(
      count[
        ethnicity == "Not Hispanic or Latino" & race == "White (single race)"
      ],
      na.rm = TRUE
    ) /
      sum(count, na.rm = TRUE)
  ) %>%
  mutate(stat = "Non-Hispanic White")

diverge_regional <- bind_rows(
  left_join(fire_vehicle_reg, pop_vehicle_reg, by = c('usfs_region', 'stat')),
  left_join(fire_poverty_reg, pop_poverty_reg, by = c('usfs_region', 'stat')),
  left_join(fire_housing_reg, pop_housing_reg, by = c('usfs_region', 'stat')),
  left_join(fire_white_reg, pop_white_reg, by = c('usfs_region', 'stat'))
) %>%
  mutate(
    diff = frac - frac_pop,
    stat = factor(stat, levels = stat_order)
  ) %>%
  inner_join(REGION_ORDER, by = 'usfs_region') %>%
  mutate(usfs_region = fct_reorder(usfs_region, plot_order))

# Race diverging data
fire_race <- race_by_wf %>%
  mutate(
    race_group = if_else(ethnicity == "Hispanic or Latino", "Hispanic", race)
  ) %>%
  group_by(race_group) %>%
  summarize(
    frac = sum(count, na.rm = TRUE) / sum(race_by_wf$count, na.rm = TRUE)
  )

pop_race <- read_parquet(here('data/processed/nhgis/race.parquet')) %>%
  most_recent_period() %>%
  filter(GEOID %in% high_risk_geoids) %>%
  mutate(
    race_group = if_else(ethnicity == "Hispanic or Latino", "Hispanic", race)
  ) %>%
  group_by(race_group) %>%
  summarize(count = sum(count, na.rm = TRUE)) %>%
  mutate(frac_pop = count / sum(count)) %>%
  select(race_group, frac_pop)

diverge_race <- left_join(fire_race, pop_race, by = 'race_group') %>%
  mutate(
    diff = frac - frac_pop,
    race_group = case_when(
      str_detect(race_group, "Black or African American") ~ "Black",
      str_detect(
        race_group,
        "American Indian"
      ) ~ "AIAN, Asian, or Pacific Islander",
      str_detect(race_group, "Some Other Race") ~ "Other",
      str_detect(race_group, "White") ~ "White",
      TRUE ~ race_group
    ),
    race_group = fct_reorder(race_group, diff)
  )
```

### Overall

```{r diverge_overall_fig, fig.height = 2}
#| fig-cap: "Difference in fire-affected vs. high-wildfire-risk population shares, pooled 2000–2024"
div_theme <- pop_theme +
  theme(
    axis.text.x = element_text(angle = 0, vjust = 0.5),
    axis.ticks.y = element_blank()
  )

ggplot(diverge_national, aes(x = diff, y = stat)) +
  geom_col(
    fill = khroma::color('light', reverse = FALSE)(1),
    color = "grey25",
    linewidth = .1
  ) +
  geom_vline(xintercept = 0, color = 'grey25', linewidth = 0.4) +
  scale_x_continuous(
    labels = scales::percent_format(accuracy = 1),
    limits = function(x) max(abs(x)) * c(-1, 1)
  ) +
  xlab("Fire-affected minus high-risk reference (percentage points)") +
  ylab(NULL) +
  div_theme +
  theme(
    panel.border = element_rect(color = "grey25", fill = NA, linewidth = .25)
  )
```

### By Region

```{r diverge_regional_fig, fig.height = 6, fig.width = 14}
#| fig-cap: "Difference in fire-affected vs. high-wildfire-risk population shares by USFS region, pooled 2000–2024"
ggplot(diverge_regional, aes(x = diff, y = usfs_region, fill = usfs_region)) +
  geom_col(width = 1, color = "grey25", linewidth = .1) +
  geom_vline(xintercept = 0, color = 'grey25', linewidth = 0.4) +
  scale_fill_manual(values = region_colors) +
  scale_x_continuous(
    labels = scales::percent_format(accuracy = 1),
    limits = function(x) max(abs(x)) * c(-1, 1)
  ) +
  facet_grid(stat ~ ., scales = 'fixed') +
  xlab("Fire-affected minus high-risk reference (percentage points)") +
  ylab(NULL) +
  div_theme +
  theme(
    strip.text.y = element_text(angle = 0, hjust = 0, size = 8),
    axis.text.y = element_text(angle = 45, hjust = 1),
    panel.spacing.y = unit(0, 'pt'),
    panel.border = element_rect(color = "grey25", fill = NA, linewidth = .25)
  )
```

### Race Breakdown

```{r diverge_race_fig, fig.height = 3}
#| fig-cap: "Race/ethnicity composition: fire-affected minus high-wildfire-risk population share, pooled 2000–2024"
ggplot(diverge_race, aes(x = diff, y = race_group)) +
  geom_col(
    fill = khroma::color('light', reverse = FALSE)(1),
    color = "grey25",
    linewidth = .1
  ) +
  geom_vline(xintercept = 0, color = 'grey25', linewidth = 0.4) +
  scale_x_continuous(
    labels = scales::percent_format(accuracy = 1),
    limits = function(x) max(abs(x)) * c(-1, 1)
  ) +
  xlab("Fire-affected minus high-risk reference (percentage points)") +
  ylab(NULL) +
  div_theme +
  theme(
    panel.border = element_rect(color = "grey25", fill = NA, linewidth = .25)
  )
```
